definition.featurexml: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="no"?><xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block deletable="false" type="feature_container" x="-209" y="75"><value name="feature"><block inline="false" type="feature_random_patch"><field name="tries">6</field><field name="xzSpread">7</field><field name="ySpread">3</field><comment h="80" pinned="false" w="160">We try to place up to 10 cactus columns</comment><value name="feature"><block type="placed_feature_inline"><comment h="80" pinned="false" w="160">We use the extra placement to make sure that the cacti only generate in valid spots</comment><value name="feature"><block inline="false" type="feature_block_column_simple"><comment h="80" pinned="false" w="160">This represents a single cactus column</comment><value name="height"><block type="int_provider_biased_to_bottom"><field name="min">1</field><field name="max">3</field></block></value><value name="block"><block type="blockstate_selector"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" inputs="0"/><field name="block">CUSTOM:CactusWood</field></block></value></block></value><statement name="placement"><block type="placement_block_predicate_filter"><comment h="80" pinned="false" w="160">We check if each column is at a valid place</comment><value name="condition"><block type="block_predicate_all_of"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" inputs="2"/><value name="condition0"><block type="block_predicate_is_air"/></value><value name="condition1"><block type="block_predicate_would_survive"><field name="x">0</field><field name="y">0</field><field name="z">0</field><value name="block"><block type="blockstate_selector"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" inputs="0"/><field name="block">Blocks.CACTUS</field></block></value></block></value></block></value></block></statement></block></value></block></value><next><block type="placement_rarity"><field name="rarity">10</field><comment h="80" pinned="false" w="160">This is so the patch only generates in some of the chunks. The higher the value, the rarer the patch will be</comment><next><block type="placement_in_square"><comment h="83" pinned="false" w="182">We then move each patch horizontally. This way they don't generate only in the corner of the chunk</comment><next><block type="placement_heightmap"><field name="heightmap">MOTION_BLOCKING</field><comment h="92" pinned="false" w="165">We then move the patches at the highest motion blocking block, so that they generate on the surface</comment><next><block type="placement_biome_filter"><comment h="80" pinned="false" w="160">We add a biome filter, so that the patches don't generate outside of the current biome</comment></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
